page.noVenue: No restaurant linked to this account.

view.subtitlePro: Pro plan — full history and advanced panels.
view.emptyBody: After your first reservations, you'll see covers, no-shows, party mix and traffic sources here — updated every night.

proGate.title: Advanced analytics
proGate.body: No-show heat map, cohort retention, booking lead-time distribution, source attribution and a 4-week forecast — available with the Pro plan.

coversPerService.title: Covers per service
coversPerService.empty: Covers per service appear after your first completed reservations.

noShowTrend.title: No-show rate
noShowTrend.empty: The no-show trend appears as reservations build up.

partyMix.title: Party mix
partyMix.empty: The party-size distribution appears after your first reservations.

cancellations.title: Cancellation reasons
cancellations.empty: No cancellations in this period — excellent.

heatMap.title: No-show heat map
heatMap.empty: The heat map appears after 30 days of reservations.

cohort.title: Cohort retention
cohort.empty: Cohort retention appears as guests return.

leadTime.title: Booking lead time (median)
leadTime.empty: The booking lead-time distribution appears after your first reservations.

channel.title: Source attribution
channel.empty: Source attribution appears after your first reservations with an identified guest.

forecast.title: Covers forecast
forecast.empty: The forecast appears after 12 weeks of reservations for each day of the week.

export.title: Download your data
export.doneBody: We'll email you a download link when it's ready (~5 min).
